NKJV.1: Praise the LORD, all you Gentiles! Laud Him, all you peoples!
NKJV.2: For His merciful kindness is great toward us, And the truth of the LORD endures forever. Praise the LORD!

KJV.1: O praise<S>1984</S> the LORD<S>3068</S>, all ye nations<S>1471</S>: praise<S>7623</S> him, all ye people<S>523</S>.
KJV.2: For his merciful<S>2617</S> kindness<S>2617</S> is great<S>1396</S> toward us: and the truth<S>571</S> of the LORD<S>3068</S> endureth for ever<S>5769</S>. Praise<S>1984</S> ye the LORD<S>3050</S>.

ESV.1: Praise the LORD, all nations! Extol him, all peoples!
ESV.2: For great is his steadfast love toward us, and the faithfulness of the LORD endures forever. Praise the LORD!

NASB.1: Praise the LORD, all nations; Laud Him, all peoples!
NASB.2: For His lovingkindness is great toward us, And the truth of the LORD is everlasting. Praise the LORD!

NLT.1:
Praise the LORD, all you nations.
Praise him, all you people of the earth.
NLT.2:
For his unfailing love for us is powerful;
the LORD’s faithfulness endures forever.
Praise the LORD!

WEB.1: Praise Yahweh, all you nations! Extol him, all you peoples!
WEB.2: For his loving kindness is great toward us. Yahweh’s faithfulness endures forever. Praise Yah!

CSB17.1:
Praise the LORD, all nations!
Glorify him, all peoples! ⓒ
CSB17.2:
For his faithful love to us is great;
the LORD’s faithfulness endures forever. ⓓ
Hallelujah!

AMP.1:
O praise the LORD, all you nations!
Praise Him, all you people!
AMP.2:
For His lovingkindness prevails over us [and we triumph and overcome through Him],
And the truth of the LORD endures forever.
Praise the LORD! (Hallelujah!)

MSG.1:
Praise God, everybody!
Applaud God, all people!
MSG.2:
His love has taken over our lives;
God's faithful ways are eternal.
Hallelujah!

extol him, all you peoples.
NIV.2:

and the faithfulness of the Lord endures forever.
Praise the Lord.

NET.1: Praise the LORD, all you nations! Applaud him, all you foreigners!
NET.2: For his loyal love towers over us, and the LORD’s faithfulness endures. Praise the LORD!
